mapper.sql: d.diary_id, d.public_id, d.user_id, u.username AS author_name, d.space_id, d.title, d.date, d.content, d.mood_key, d.content_format, d.visibility, d.locked, d.version, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary (public_id, user_id, space_id, title, date, content, mood_key, content_format, visibility, locked, version, created_at) VALUES (#{publicId}, #{userId}, #{spaceId}, #{title}, #{date}, #{content}, #{moodKey}, #{contentFormat}, #{visibility}, #{locked}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.space_id = #{spaceId} AND d.public_id = #{publicId}
SELECT FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.public_id = #{publicId}
SELECT FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.space_id = #{spaceId} AND d.public_id = #{publicId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.diary_id = #{diaryId}

SELECT d.diary_id,d.public_id,d.user_id,u.username AS author_name,d.space_id, d.title,d.date,LEFT(d.content,1200) AS content,d.mood_key,d.content_format, d.visibility,d.locked,d.version,d.created_at,d.updated_at,d.deleted_at FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE ORDER BY d.deleted_at DESCd.date DESC, d.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary d WHERE

SELECT FROM diary d INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.space_id = #{spaceId} AND (d.visibility = 'SHARED' OR d.user_id = #{userId}) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.date ASC, d.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE diary SET title = #{diary.title}, date = #{diary.date}, content = #{diary.content}, mood_key = #{diary.moodKey}, content_format = #{diary.contentFormat}, visibility = #{diary.visibility}, locked = #{diary.locked}, version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diary.diaryId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE diary SET deleted_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE diary SET deleted_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL

UPDATE diary SET title = #{diary.title}, date = #{diary.date}, content = #{diary.content}, mood_key = #{diary.moodKey}, content_format = #{diary.contentFormat}, visibility = #{diary.visibility}, locked = #{diary.locked}, version = version + 1 WHERE diary_id = #{diary.diaryId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_revision (diary_id, version, editor_user_id, snapshot_json) VALUES (#{diaryId}, #{version}, #{editorUserId}, #{snapshotJson})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username AS editor_name FROM diary_revision r INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = r.editor_user_id WHERE r.diary_id = #{diaryId} ORDER BY r.version DESC
SELECT r.*, u.username AS editor_name FROM diary_revision r INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = r.editor_user_id WHERE r.diary_id = #{diaryId} AND r.revision_id = #{revisionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_comment (public_id, diary_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{publicId}, #{diaryId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar_path FROM diary_comment c INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.diary_id = #{diaryId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar_path FROM diary_comment c INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE c.diary_id = #{diaryId} AND c.public_id = #{publicId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE diary_comment SET content = #{content} WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE diary_comment SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO diary_reaction (diary_id, user_id, emoji) VALUES (#{diaryId}, #{userId}, #{emoji})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM diary_reaction WHERE diary_id = #{diaryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND emoji = #{emoji}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username FROM diary_reaction r INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = r.user_id WHERE r.diary_id = #{diaryId} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC
